mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.remark, r.enabled FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.service_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.perm_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, nickname, password, mobile, email, avatar, enabled, must_change_password, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{keyword} OR mobile = #{keyword} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, nickname, password, mobile, email, avatar, enabled, must_change_password, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE mobile = #{mobile} LIMIT 1
